title: Simple Fruit Classification
scenario:
Write a short paragraph describing a fruit as 'tropical' or 'temperate' based on its growing conditions.
A fruit is considered 'tropical' if it grows near the equator and has a thick skin, while it's 'temperate' if it grows in cooler climates with a thinner skin.
For example: 'Mangoes are a tropical fruit.'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the text meets the character limit and classification requirement
Verify the tone of the text is informative and neutral
Check if the classification is correct based on the given growing conditions
